$comment: v1.7.0 boundary-stress non-regression FLOORS gate (the per-locale half; the 4-shape TARGET half is scripts/eval/boundary-stress-gate.ts). Derived from v1.6.0-boundary-stress.json. 2026-06-18 (D3 / #718 / #564): the per-locale floors were RE-DERIVED from the corrected anchor-ON measurements — see $comment_d3_anchor_rederive. The headline non-regression role is UNCHANGED: us.locality is still the locality-regression guard (v1.6.0 FAILED it at 66.2, the regression v1.7.0's bare-locality shape fixes), now at the anchor-on-derived 74.0.
$comment_d3_anchor_rederive: D3 / #718 / #564 floor re-derivation (2026-06-18, STATED + operator-approved — a gate-contract change, NOT silent drift). ROOT CAUSE: per-locale-f1.ts fed the model anchor-OFF by default until commit d7b51748 (2026-06-18 16:15). An anchor-trained STAGE3 model scored anchor-off is OUT-OF-DISTRIBUTION and SELECTIVELY collapses the admin tags (country/region/locality/postcode) while morphology tags survive (docs/articles/evals/2026-06-18-v150-vs-v170-head-to-head.md §'Golden per-tag F1'). Every floor sourced from per-locale-f1.ts was therefore set against a DEPRESSED number — too LOW, missing real regressions. SOURCE OF TRUTH for the re-derivation = the production-faithful (anchor-ON) v1.5.0 per-tag F1 (the production DEFAULT these floors must protect): head-to-head table + neural-weights-en-us/model-card.json eval.per_component_int8_shipconfig + capabilities.server (which corroborate where the metric matches: locality 77.3, region 90.4, postcode 98.6). SCOPE: only the per-locale-f1-derived floors are re-derived (us.{postcode,micro,locality,region,street}, fr.{postcode,house_number,region}); the affix/country/de/arena/po_box/cedex/intersection floors were ALREADY scored anchor-on (score-affix.ts / score-country-homograph.ts / de-order-eval.sh default the anchor + gazetteer feed), so their bases are honest and they are UNCHANGED. MARGIN: corrected floor = anchor-on F1 − margin; 3pp for large-support tags (covers the int8↔fp32 quant delta the gate caps at 1.5pp + ~0.6-1.5pp run-to-run/eval-set spread observed between the int8-shipconfig and fp32-h2h readings, with buffer), 5pp for fr.region (only ~197 supporting golden rows, historically volatile — drifted 27.6→16.2 unfloored). CONSERVATISM RULE: never derive a floor BELOW its current value — the anchor-off artifact only ever depressed these tags, so a derived value under the current floor (us.postcode 95.6<97.0, fr.postcode 96.9<99.5) means the existing floor is already tighter+protective and is KEPT. us.country_homograph_f1 83.3 is NOT anchor-off (score-country-homograph.ts was always anchor-on) and 83.3 is v1.5.0's REAL anchor-on score (head-to-head §country-homograph), NOT stale — KEPT as a deliberate decision, reversing the night-shift's mistaken 'stale floor' read.
$comment_rederive_table: RE-DERIVED (anchor-on F1 → margin → floor): us.micro 87.4 −3 → 84.0 (was 81.6); us.locality 77.3 −3 → 74.0 (was 72.9, still the regression guard); us.region 90.4 −3 → 87.0 (was 80.1); us.street 80.2 −3 → 77.0 (was 74.0 — supersedes the prior 'kept 74.0, re-anchor when convenient' note; now anchored to the measured anchor-on 80.2/80.8); fr.house_number 99.3 −3 → 96.0 (was 87.0 — THE #564 correction: the 54.5/87.4 'collapse' that justified the 85-87 literature-anchored floor was an anchor-OFF artifact; anchor-on, both v1.5.0 and v1.7.0 score 99.3, no reorder collapse in production); fr.region 41.8 −5 → 36.0 (was 16.2). KEPT (derived < current, current tighter): us.postcode (98.6 −3 = 95.6 < 97.0); fr.postcode (99.9 −3 = 96.9 < 99.5). KEPT (basis was already anchor-on, out of D3 scope): us.country_homograph_f1 83.3, us.street_prefix 78.0, us.street_suffix 67.0, us.unit_real 88.0, de.native_locality 83.8, arena.perturb 71.0, us.po_box_real 70.0, fr.cedex_real 70.0, us.intersection_real 50.0.
$comment_v170_guards: TWO v1.7.0 guards ride as gate-time STANDALONE PROBES (not floors-map keys — the promotion-gate.sh verdict assembler has no scorer for them, and adding unscored keys would FAIL loudly). Phase 7 runs them and flags a regression: (1) bare_locality — re-run scripts/eval/locality-regression-probe.ts v1.5.1->v1.7.0; the 84%-dropped 'City, STATE' surface must RECOVER (v1.6.0 net -130 on US-golden locality; v1.7.0 should be net >=0 and the 'dropped' failure mode should shrink). (2) street_recall_full — scripts/eval/street-recall-full-probe.ts v1.5.1->v1.7.0; DeepSeek's blind-spot: bare-locality emphasis can eat the street's leading tokens on FULL addresses. v1.5.1 baseline = 33.7% street-exact on 977 full-address rows; v1.6.0 (no bare-locality) was 37.9%. FLOOR: v1.7.0 within 1pp of v1.5.1 (>=32.7%); WARN if it drops below v1.6.0's 37.9%.
label: v1.7.0-boundary-stress
